seo.title: Free Remodeling Consultation
seo.description: Schedule a free remodeling consultation with BuiltWell CT, in-person or via video call. No obligation, no pressure. Serving all of Connecticut.
seo.og_image_alt: BuiltWell CT free remodeling consultation , serving Connecticut homeowners

schema.name: Free Remodeling Consultation in Connecticut
schema.description: Schedule a free remodeling consultation with BuiltWell CT, in-person or remote. We assess your space, answer questions, and prepare a written estimate. CT HIC #0668405.

data.content: The consultation is where everything starts. It is free, there is no obligation, and it is how we make sure your project begins with a clear shared understanding of what you want and what it will take to deliver it.

data.title: How the Consultation Works
data.content:
A BuiltWell consultation is an in-person visit to your home or a video call via Google Meet or Zoom, your choice, during which we assess your space, discuss your goals, and answer every question you have before any work is scoped or priced.

Here is what to expect, step by step:

Step 1: Contact us by phone or through the contact form at /contact/. Tell us what you're working on and where you're located in Connecticut.

Step 2: We schedule a time. You choose whether you'd prefer an on-site visit or a video call via Google Meet or Zoom. Both are equally available.

Step 3: During the consultation, we discuss your goals for the project, assess the space in person or review photos and video you share remotely, and answer every question you have. We look at existing conditions that affect scope: plumbing locations, electrical capacity, subfloor and wall construction, moisture, ceiling heights, and anything else relevant to the type of work you're considering. We don't rush the consultation.

Step 4: After the consultation, we prepare a detailed written estimate covering scope, materials, timeline, and cost. Most estimates are delivered within 3 to 5 business days.

Step 5: You review the estimate. If you'd like to move forward, we schedule the next step. If you need time or decide not to proceed, there is no pressure in either direction. The estimate is yours to keep.

data.title: What to Expect From Your Estimate
data.content:
The written estimate covers scope, materials, timeline, and total cost. No vague ranges, no line items that say only "labor" with a number next to them.

A BuiltWell estimate includes:

- Itemized scope of work: what is included and what is explicitly excluded, written in plain terms
- Material specifications: the specific products, categories, and grades included so you can verify what you're getting
- Timeline: start date, construction duration, and any lead times that affect scheduling, such as custom cabinet orders
- Total cost: the full project cost as proposed, including all permits, labor, and materials

The estimate is fixed at what is written. If something changes during the project, we discuss it with you before proceeding and document it in a written change order with a specific cost and time impact. You don't get handed a surprise invoice at the end.

Read more about how our proposals and construction process work on our [process page](/process/).

data.title: On-Site vs. Remote Consultations
data.subtitle: BuiltWell CT offers both in-person home visits and remote video consultations via Google Meet or Zoom, with on-site visits recommended for projects involving structural, plumbing, or layout changes.

cards.title: On-Site Consultation
cards.description: We visit your home, walk the space, measure, and assess existing conditions including plumbing, electrical, subfloor, and moisture levels. On-site consultations are best for projects involving structural changes, layout modifications, or when accurate measurements are critical to the estimate. Available Monday through Friday.

cards.title: Remote Consultation
cards.description: Meet via Google Meet or Zoom from anywhere. Share photos, walk us through the space on camera, and discuss your goals. Remote consultations are effective for kitchen, bathroom, flooring, and finish-level projects where you want to start the conversation before committing to an on-site visit. Available Monday through Saturday.

data.title: Service Areas
data.content: We serve homeowners throughout [Fairfield County](/fairfield-county/) and [New Haven County](/new-haven-county/), Connecticut. If you're not sure whether we cover your town, contact us and we'll confirm.

data.title: Book Your Consultation
data.content:
Call the number for your county or use the contact form at /contact/ to request a time. We respond within one business day.

Fairfield County: (203) 919-9616
New Haven County: (203) 466-9148
